name: Wrist MRI
description: MRI of the wrist for evaluation of ligaments, TFCC, and carpal pathology

findings.technique: MRI of the wrist was performed in multiple planes including T1, T2, PD, and STIR sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Scapholunate Ligament
sections.content: The scapholunate ligament demonstrates [intact / no tear / no sprain]. The ligament is [intact]

sections.name: Lunotriquetral Ligament
sections.content: The lunotriquetral ligament demonstrates [intact / no tear / no sprain]. The ligament is [intact]

sections.name: TFCC
sections.content: The triangular fibrocartilage complex demonstrates [intact / no tear / no perforation]. The TFCC is [intact]

sections.name: Carpal Bones
sections.content: The carpal bones demonstrate [no fracture / no avascular necrosis / no carpal instability]. The bone marrow signal is [normal]

sections.name: Extensor Tendons
sections.content: The extensor tendons demonstrate [no tear / no tendinopathy]. The tendons are [intact]

sections.name: Flexor Tendons
sections.content: The flexor tendons demonstrate [no tear / no tendinopathy]. The tendons are [intact]

sections.name: Joint
sections.content: The wrist joint demonstrates [no effusion / no osteochondral lesion / no cartilage defect]. No joint effusion.

sections.name: Ulnar styloid
sections.content: The ulnar styloid demonstrates [no fracture / no non-union]. The styloid process is [intact]

impression:
1. Normal wrist MRI.
2. No ligamentous injury, TFCC tear, or carpal instability identified.
